category_sources: Official GitHub README says libnfc allows userspace application access to NFC devices.
source_facts.description: Low level NFC SDK and Programmers API
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and nfc-tools project page are named libnfc.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README covers requirements, building, installation, configuration, environment variables, and bug reporting.
Official nfc-tools project page documents features and source checkout.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/nfc-tools/libnfc; per instruction repo is returned as null when source_facts.repo is present.
tags_sources: Official nfc-tools page describes NFC device support, PN53x commands, and programmer API features.
source_facts.description identifies low-level NFC SDK and programmer API.
